title: begonia peltata
intro: Begonia peltata, also known as the calyx begonia, is a species of flowering plant in the Begoniaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever and rheumatism. The leaves and roots of Begonia peltata are known to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Begonia peltata include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
